texto: Lies I've told my 3 year old recently Trees talk to each other at night.All fish are named either Lorna or Jack.Before your eyeballs fall out from watching too much TV, they get very loose.Tiny bears live in drain pipes. If you are very very quiet you can hear the clouds rub against the sky.The moon and the sun had a fight a long time ago.Everyone knows at least one secret language.When nobody is looking, I can fly.We are all held together by invisible threads.Books get lonely too.Sadness can be eaten.I will always be there.
explicacao: Citação de Raúl Gutierrez sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Lies I've told my 3 year old recently Trees talk to each other at night.All fish are named either…” articula tempo, lies, poetry em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
